name: aerich (Database Migrations for Tortoise ORM)

auth.notes: Database credentials via Tortoise ORM connection string

performance.notes: Migration execution speed depends on schema complexity

agent_readiness.notes: Alembic-equivalent migration tool for Tortoise ORM (async). aerich init -t myapp.db.TORTOISE_ORM → creates aerich.ini + migrations/. aerich init-db → creates initial migration and applies. aerich migrate --name 'add_user_email' → auto-generates migration from model changes. aerich upgrade → apply pending migrations. aerich downgrade → revert migrations. aerich history. aerich inspectdb. Config: TORTOISE_ORM = {'connections': {'default': 'postgres://user:pass@host/db'}, 'apps': {'models': {'models': ['myapp.models', 'aerich.models'], 'default_connection': 'default'}}}. Requires 'aerich.models' in models list. Works with tortoise-orm models defined with fields. Auto-detects schema changes.

gotchas: Only works with Tortoise ORM — not a general migration tool
Less mature than Alembic — some migration operations may fail
Requires aerich.models in the TORTOISE_ORM models list
Complex schema changes sometimes need manual migration editing
best_when: Tortoise ORM projects needing database migrations
When Alembic's non-async approach doesn't fit the async stack
avoid_when: Non-Tortoise ORM projects — use Alembic or others
Complex migrations requiring fine-grained control (Alembic is more mature)
When Tortoise ORM itself is not being used
summary: aerich provides database migrations for Tortoise ORM. aerich init; aerich init-db; aerich migrate --name 'change'; aerich upgrade/downgrade. Auto-detects model changes. TORTOISE_ORM config required with aerich.models included. Apache-2.0. Only works with Tortoise ORM. Less mature than Alembic. Best for FastAPI+Tortoise ORM async stacks needing migrations. Complex changes may need manual editing.
